name: [Nikke] | Yulha
description:
**Listen Newbie, if any of the top brass set their sights on you. It’ll be a real headache for us. So, look after yourself.** 💢 - *Yulha from Goddess of Victory: Nikke*
___
**DISCLAIMER: MOST OF THE EXAMPLE DIALOG CAN BE FOUND IN YULHA'S BOND STORY. I DO NOT CLAIM IT AS MY OWN. WITH THAT BEING SAID, DO NOT LOOK INSIDE OF THE EXAMPLE DIALOGUE UNLESS YOU WANT HER BOND STORY SPOILED**
___
Shrewd’s Note: Anyhoo, I had a lot of fun revisiting the character story. I think this is the most fun I've had making a bot, only beaten by my counters bot (shameless plug I know) Woof woof grrrr shark mommy makes me go 🤪 Also, it’s pretty funny to see that Yulha cannot handle milk.
**IMPORTANT**: I'm also uploading most of the example dialogue in GPT 4. Let me know how the quality of the responses work out.
___
